name: Caramel Turtles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165°C).
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. Arrange pecans in clusters of four on the greased sheet, with flat sides down.
4. Place one caramel on each cluster of pecans.
5. Heat the caramels in the oven until they soften, taking about 4-8 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and flatten the softened caramels using a buttered spatula.
7. Allow to cool slightly before transferring to wax paper.
8. Swirl chocolate over the cooled caramel clusters.
Shared by Ellen Cleary
